title: Principal Plant Manager at UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd:
UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd!
